access_tiers.description: Public metadata and preview-safe product contracts.
Reserved for future metered Stock Trends intelligence products.

payload.disclaimer: This Stock Trends intelligence product is non-advisory market structure context. It is not investment advice and does not account for individual portfolio circumstances.
payload.framework_note: Stock Trends public intelligence is derived from Stock Trends signal data and framed probabilistically. RSI means relative performance versus the benchmark with baseline 100. ST-IM means Stock Trends Inference Model: a probabilistic model producing forward return expectations and statistical distributions across 4-week, 13-week, and 40-week horizons.

supported_providers.description: Stock Trends Inference Model (ST-IM): a probabilistic model producing forward return expectations and statistical distributions across 4-week, 13-week, and 40-week horizons.

provider.description: Stock Trends Inference Model (ST-IM): a probabilistic model producing forward return expectations and statistical distributions across 4-week, 13-week, and 40-week horizons.
